title: Olympics once again buzzing with fans and crowds in first post-COVID Games | Ponca City News
description: PARIS — In what has become a daily ritual, crowds jostle along the Champs-Élysées, bypassing cafes and expensive shops, moving eastward in numbers so great that they spill off the sidewalks and into the street.
